findings.description: The section content preserves RST-specific `:doc:` navigation syntax (e.g., `:doc:`../handler/TransactionManagementHandler``) verbatim. This RST markup is not useful in a knowledge file context; plain class names should be used instead.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists handlers as '- :doc:`../handler/TransactionManagementHandler`' etc. Knowledge file copies this RST syntax directly into the section body.

findings.description: s3 hints are missing PascalCase class names `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` and `MultiThreadExecutionHandler`, both of which appear as actual class names in the XML configuration example embedded in s3.
findings.source_evidence: Source s3 XML: `<component class="nablarch.fw.handler.RequestPathJavaPackageMapping">` and `<component class="nablarch.fw.handler.MultiThreadExecutionHandler">`. Neither appears in s3 hints (they are in s2 hints only).
